title: Principal Frontend Developer at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Sasken Technologies Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Sasken Technologies Holdings Services in Jabalpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sasken Technologies Holdings Services:
Sasken Technologies Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sasken Technologies Holdings Services!
